steps.title: Translate the percent increase
steps.content:
A value that is $24\%$ greater than $75$ is $124\%$ of $75$, so the multiplier is $1.24$:
$$k=75(1.24)$$

steps.title: Compare with the product form
steps.content:
The question also says $k=75r$. Comparing the two expressions for $k$ gives:
$$75r=75(1.24)$$
$$r=1.24$$
The answer is C.
